language_goal: ['watch the video carefully, then place the blue cube on the first target it was previously placed on', 'watch the video carefully and place the blue cube on the first target where it was placed']

['watch the video carefully, then place the red cube on the target right after the button was pressed', 'watch the video carefully and place the red cube on the target where it was placed immediately after the button was pressed']
['watch the video carefully, then pick up the container hiding the blue cube']
['watch the video carefully, then pick up the container hiding the green cube']

['watch the video carefully, then repeatedly pick up and put down the same block that was previously picked up for two times, finally put it down and press the button to stop', 'watch the video carefully, then pick up the same cube that was previously picked up for two times, finally press the button to stop']

['Watch the video carefully, then use the stick attached to the robot to navigate around the sticks on the table, following the same path', 'watch the video carefully, then use the stick attached to the robot to navigate around the sticks on the table, following the same path shown in the video']

['Watch the video carefully, then use the stick attached to the robot to retrace the same pattern', 'watch the video carefully, then use the stick attached to the robot to retrace the same pattern shown in the video']
['put two red cubes into the bin, then press the button to stop', 'put two red cubes into the bin and press the button to stop']
['first press the button, then pick up the container hiding the red cube']
['first press both buttons on the table, then pick up the container hiding the blue cube, finally pick up another container hiding the green cube']

['pick up the red cube and place it on the target, repeating this action two times, then press the button to stop', 'pick up the red cube and place it on the target, repeating this pick-and-place action two times, then press the button to stop']

['first press the button, then pick up all cubes that have been highlighteted with white areas on the table', 'first press the button, then pick up all highlighted cubes, finally press the button again to stop']

['pick up the red cube, move it to the top of the right-side target, then move it to the top of the left-side target, repeating this back and forth motion two times, finally press the button to stop', 'pick up the red cube, move it to the right-side target and then to the left-side target, repeating this right-to-left swing motion two times, then put down the cube and press the button to stop']
['press the button to stop the cube just as it reaches the target for the fourth time', 'press the button to stop the cube exactly at the target on its fourth visit']
['watch the video carefully, then move the cube to the target in the same manner as before', 'watch the video carefully, then move the cube to the target in the same manner shown in the video']
